corpus.title: Westfield County Board of Commissioners — Resolution 2024-14
corpus.snippet: Westfield County commissioners approved a 12-month pilot program for free senior bus passes, effective March 2024....
corpus.content:
WESTFIELD COUNTY BOARD OF COMMISSIONERS
Resolution 2024-14 | Adopted: February 8, 2024

SUBJECT: Senior Mobility Pilot Program

RESOLVED: The Board authorises a 12-month pilot program providing zero-cost transit passes to county residents aged 65 and older, commencing March 1, 2024 and concluding February 28, 2025. Estimated program cost: $340,000, funded from the Community Services Reserve Fund.
Commissioner votes: 4-1 in favour.

corpus.title: News: Westfield County — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Westfield County commissioners approved a 12-month pilot program for free senior bus passes, effecti...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Westfield County makes a significant move amid changes in the municipal sector

Westfield County commissioners approved a 12-month pilot program for free senior bus passes, effective March 2024. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in municipal strategy. A spokesperson for Westfield County declined to comment beyond the official statement.
